privileged_info_summary: The task uses an authentic US Census Bureau spreadsheet (us_census_population.xlsx) containing verified 2020 Census population data for all 50 US states and District of Columbia. Column C contains official Census population figures (header: 'Population (2020 Census)'), with data in rows 2-52. The total population across all entries is 331,449,281, matching the official 2020 Census count exactly. All sample values (California: 39,538,223; Texas: 29,145,505; Wyoming: 576,851) match official Census figures. The first empty cell below the data in column C is C53, where a SUM formula should be placed.
